notes: After the agent runs /excavate against a copy of fixture/, the project must have the two-doc minimum (CLAUDE.md naming both services + ports) and .gravity/integration/ with a SPEC + four structural dumps. The SPEC's Boundary Map must contain the three REAL seams (web->order-api /api/orders + /api/customers, order-api->inventory-api /api/stock, order-api->DB ORDERS/CUSTOMERS) and must NOT contain the dead frontend call (/api/ghost/stats matches no controller) or the orphaned mapper table (LEGACY_AUDIT's selectAuditTrail has no interface method and no caller) — both must instead appear as findings/OPEN items elsewhere in the SPEC. A fabricated seam is the exact bug this scenario catches.
